name: 2'6"x4' Geometric Woven Accent Rug Black - Threshold™: Handmade Cotton Wool Jute Flat Pile Indoor Rug
description:
Create a perfect focal point in your indoor space with this Geometric Woven Accent Rug from Threshold™. The handmade accent rug features a black geometric pattern on a white backdrop for a charming look, making the perfect addition to your indoor space. Plus, the flat-pile construction makes it ideal for high-traffic areas. The neutral tone allows for a seamless coordination with almost any existing decor, making it a versatile accent piece.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
